title: [InstCombine][profcheck] Propogate profile metadata when transforming br (X && !Y) to br (!X || Y)
author: snehasish
description: Updated visitBranchInst to propagate and swap !prof metadata when transforming br (X && !Y) to br (!X || Y).

tests.test_body:
define i32 @logical_and_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
entry:
  %noty = xor i1 %y, true
  %and = select i1 %x, i1 %noty, i1 false, !prof !0
  br i1 %and, label %t, label %f, !prof !0

t:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 42

f:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 3
}

!0 = !{!"branch_weights", i32 10, i32 20}

define i32 @logical_or_not(i1 %x, i1 %y) {
entry:
  %notx = xor i1 %x, true
  %and = select i1 %notx, i1 true, i1 %y, !prof !0
  br i1 %and, label %f, label %t, !prof !0

t:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 42

f:                                                ; preds = %entry
  ret i32 3
}

!0 = !{!"branch_weights", i32 10, i32 20}

comments.author: snehasish
comments.body:
[draft for discussion]

Looks like there are a few places where swap successors for a given branch. The existing logic updates branch probability info but not the branch weights. I'm guessing we want to swap the weights as well to keep them consistent particularly for downstream passes which may utilize the weights directly? @mtrofin @alanzhao1  wdyt?

If this looks good, I'll refactor into a common helper and add it to all the places where this is needed.

comments.author: mtrofin
comments.body: Like you mean change `BPI->swapSuccEdgesProbabiities` to do that? seems reasonable to me. Are there other APIs in BPI that allow "update" and don't pair the update with a rewrite of the metadata?

comments.author: snehasish
comments.body: After our offline discussion I looked into this and `swapSuccessors` updates the branch weight metadata. It's a bit cumbersome to call BPI->swapSuccEdgeProbabilities but the situation is not as bad as I initially expected. This failure is due to the missing branch weights on the new select instruction and not an inconsistency between branch weights and metadata.
